settings.title: Free Delivery
settings.description: Complimentary standard delivery on all orders over AED 400. Express same-day delivery available in Dubai for AED 85.

settings.title: Easy Returns
settings.description: Return any unworn item within 30 days of delivery. Items must have original tags attached and be in original packaging.

settings.title: Authentication
settings.description: Every item is guaranteed authentic. We provide a Certificate of Authenticity for all fine jewellery and select luxury items.

settings.title: Gift Returns
settings.description: Gift recipients may return items within 30 days with proof of purchase. Exchange or store credit issued.

settings.question: How long does delivery take?
settings.answer: Standard delivery takes 2–5 business days within the UAE.

settings.question: Can I track my order?
settings.answer: Yes. You will receive a tracking link via email and SMS once your order is dispatched.

settings.question: What is your return policy?
settings.answer: Items may be returned within 30 days if unworn, with original tags and packaging intact.

settings.question: Do you deliver internationally?
settings.answer: Yes. We ship to over 40 countries. International delivery times vary by destination.

settings.question: How do I initiate a return?
settings.answer: Log into your account, navigate to Orders, and select Return Item. Our team will arrange collection.

settings.question: Is my payment secure?
settings.answer: All transactions are processed through encrypted, PCI-DSS compliant payment gateways.
